page_metadata.biotools__summary: PhylDiag computes synteny blocs between two genomes. From the comparison of two extant genomes and corresponding gene families, PhylDiag detects conserved segments, i.e. segments of chromosomes unbroken during evolution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PhylDiag computes synteny blocs between two genomes. From the comparison of two extant genomes and corresponding gene families, PhylDiag detects conserved segments, i.e. segments of chromosomes unbroken during evolution.
